name: CI/CD Pipeline Integration
description: Set up automated deployment pipeline with cron monitoring
prompts: Show me my current Mittwald session context to confirm the active project
Set my session context to project {{PROJECT_ID}} for deployment
List all existing cron jobs in project {{PROJECT_ID}} to see what automation is already configured
Create a new cron job in project {{PROJECT_ID}} with description 'Health Check {{RUN_ID}}' that runs every 5 minutes (cron: */5 * * * *) executing a simple curl health check command
Deploy a simple Docker Compose stack to project {{PROJECT_ID}} with hello-world service
